verdict.rationale: Immigration risk is low: the regional center is active and the I-956F is approved, with an independently confirmed high-unemployment set-aside. Financial risk is mid-band and weakly evidenced — the takeout/repayment source and developer balance sheet could not be independently confirmed, so an uncertainty surcharge applies.
conditions_to_clear: Obtain the committed takeout/refinance term sheet and confirm conservative LTV/DSCR (F7).
Obtain the developer's audited balance sheet and confirm no undisclosed defaults (F4).
Confirm first-lien collateral recording at the county recorder (F3).

factors.name: Regional Center good standing
factors.summary: Active on the USCIS approved RC list; absent from the termination list.

factors.name: Job-creation methodology & cushion
factors.summary: ~38% cushion above 10 jobs/investor; IMPLAN inputs plausible but partly construction-expenditure based.

factors.name: TEA / set-aside qualification validity
factors.summary: High-unemployment designation reproduced from BLS LAUS (>150% national avg).

factors.name: Sustainment / at-risk 2-yr rule
factors.summary: PPM language consistent with 2-yr sustainment but deployment-timing evidence is issuer-only.

factors.name: Redeployment terms
factors.summary: Redeployment clause is same-RC but somewhat open-ended.

factors.name: I-526E / I-829 approval track record
factors.summary: Operator has prior I-829 approvals on earlier projects.

factors.name: RIA compliance: fund admin, audits, securities
factors.summary: Independent fund administrator engaged; Form D on EDGAR.

factors.name: Source-of-funds independence
factors.summary: Standard SOF pathway; no sanctioned jurisdictions noted.

factors.name: Capital-stack position & EB-5 %
factors.summary: Senior debt ~55%, EB-5 ~28% (mezzanine), sponsor equity ~17%. EB-5 is subordinate but not first-loss.

factors.name: Loan vs equity model & terms
factors.summary: EB-5 deployed as a mezzanine loan; terms only from PPM.

factors.name: Collateral & guarantees
factors.summary: Claimed second-lien collateral not confirmed at the county recorder.

factors.name: Developer track record & balance sheet
factors.summary: Two prior completions found in press; balance sheet not independently available.

factors.name: Construction / completion risk
factors.summary: Site permitted per municipal records; GC named but bonding unconfirmed.

factors.name: Market / demand risk
factors.summary: Independent logistics-market data supports absorption in the submarket.

factors.name: Repayment / takeout source
factors.summary: Takeout described as 'future refinance'; no committed term sheet found.

factors.name: Escrow & redeployment (financial)
factors.summary: Funds escrowed to I-526E filing per PPM.

factors.name: Fees & conflicts of interest
factors.summary: Admin + management fees to affiliates; disclosed, roughly market.

factors.name: Return-of-capital / distribution history
factors.summary: One prior project reportedly returned capital; not independently confirmed.

claims.claim_text: The regional center is in good standing with USCIS.
claims.note: Listed on the USCIS approved RC list; not on the termination list.

citations.title: USCIS Approved EB-5 Immigrant Investor Regional Centers

claims.claim_text: The project's I-956F has been approved.
claims.note: Approval confirmed via USCIS notice number.

claims.claim_text: The project sits in a qualifying high-unemployment area.
claims.note: Reproduced from BLS LAUS: tract unemployment exceeds 150% of the national average.

claims.claim_text: Each investor will create ~13.8 qualifying jobs.
claims.note: Cushion ~38%; multipliers checked against published IMPLAN ranges for warehousing.

citations.title: Trade-press coverage of comparable logistics EB-5 job models

claims.claim_text: The operator has prior conditions-removal (I-829) approvals.

citations.title: Industry tracker of operator I-829 outcomes

claims.claim_text: An independent fund administrator and audit are in place.
EB-5 is a 28% mezzanine slice behind 55% senior debt.
claims.note: Senior loan corroborated by recorder data; EB-5 share consistent.

citations.title: County recorder — recorded senior deed of trust

claims.claim_text: EB-5 loan is secured by a recorded second lien.
claims.note: No second-lien instrument located in county records as of the report date.

claims.claim_text: The developer has completed numerous similar projects.
claims.note: Two prior completions confirmed in local press; full history and balance sheet not available.

citations.title: Local business journal mention of two prior projects

claims.claim_text: Strong demand for logistics space in the submarket.
The loan will be repaid via refinance at stabilization.
claims.note: No committed takeout term sheet; repayment depends on a future refinance under unstated terms.

claims.claim_text: Fees are market-standard and fully disclosed.
claims.note: Admin and management fees flow to affiliates of the sponsor; disclosed and roughly market.

red_flags.title: No committed takeout for repayment
red_flags.detail: Return of the $800,000 depends on a future refinance for which no term sheet, LTV, or DSCR could be found.
red_flags.issuer_framing: PPM presents refinance at stabilization as routine; no committed financing exists.

red_flags.title: Second-lien collateral not recorded
red_flags.detail: The claimed second-lien security for the EB-5 loan was not located in county records.
red_flags.issuer_framing: PPM describes the loan as 'secured'; recording could not be confirmed.

red_flags.title: Affiliate fee stacking
red_flags.detail: Administrative and management fees flow to sponsor affiliates.
red_flags.issuer_framing: Disclosed and roughly market, but a conflict to watch.

data_gaps.why: No term sheet or lender commitment is public; PPM relies on a future refinance.
data_gaps.closes_with: A signed takeout term sheet or refinance commitment with LTV/DSCR.

data_gaps.why: No second-lien instrument found in county recorder data.
data_gaps.closes_with: The recorded deed of trust / UCC-1 evidencing the EB-5 lien.

data_gaps.why: Only press mentions of prior projects were found.
data_gaps.closes_with: Audited financial statements from an independent auditor.

checklist.text: Regional center active and not terminated on the USCIS list.
Reserved-category set-aside independently confirmed and valid.
Developer track record / balance sheet checked; no undisclosed defaults.
Identify and stress-test the repayment/takeout source.
Engage your own independent immigration attorney and financial advisor.

sources.title: Trade-press coverage of comparable logistics EB-5 job models
Industry tracker of operator I-829 outcomes
County recorder — recorded senior deed of trust
Local business journal mention of two prior projects
